health_conditions: hypothyroidism managed with T3 thyroid medication
history of low blood glucose episodes

benefits.description: Lost more than 50 pounds total, more than 40 pounds in a few months on Reta; down to size 34 pants and fitting into 'large' shirt instead of XL
Feels good overall; reports feeling Reta working; some weight loss likely inflammation-related

protocol_notes: 5mg is the highest tolerable dose. Plans to reduce dose to maintain weight at goal (15 pounds away). Has complete thyroid failure since age 33; takes T3 thyroid multiple times per day. Previously went from 182 lbs to 250 lbs in 6 months after thyroid failure with no increase in food consumption. Concerned about weight regain after stopping Reta.
